DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with Case No. CGC-14-276305 (Willard E. Bartel, et al vs. Alaska Steamship Corporation).

John E. Herrick of MOTLEY RICE LLC (843.216.9100), appearing for plaintiffs/opposing parties Willard E. Bartel and David C. Peebles, administrators of the Estate of Donna Hamilton, deceased, et al.

Vincent Ian Parrett of BERGESON LLP (408.291.6200), appearing for plaintiffs/opposing parties Willard E. Bartel and David C. Peebles, administrators of the Estate of Donna Hamilton, deceased, et al.

Andrew I. Port of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & WALOVICH LLP (415.227.9455), appearing for defendant/moving party Matson Navigation Company Inc.

Cheryl A. Morris of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & WALOVICH LLP (415.227.9455), appearing for defendant/moving party Matson Navigation Company Inc.

RULING:
DEFENDANT MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

All four demurrers before the Court were called/argued concurrently. The Court addressed the plaintiffs' and defendants' requests for judicial notice. Argument held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court granted plaintiffs' and defendants' requests for judicial with the exception of the request as to Hartley B. Martyn. The Court reserved ruling on the Harley B. Martyn request for judicial notice pending further argument. The Court addressed counsels' "hybrid hearing" comments as set forth on the record. Further argument/discussions held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court granted the request for judicial notice as to Hartley B. Martyn. The Court then took Defendant Olympic Steamship Co., Inc.'s Demurrer To Complaint (276305), Defendant Alaska Steamship Company's Demurrer To Complaint (276305), Defendants American President Lines, Ltd.'s And Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s Demurrer To Complaint (276305), and Defendant Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s Demurrer To Complaint (276321) under submission. Counsel stipulated that the Court's decision would be dispositive of all Demurrers before it today. The Court stated that it would proceed with the Demurrer standard of review. Counsel submitted their respective proposed orders for the Court's consideration. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Rhonda R. Harris of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #7414 (Tel: 510-451-1580). (503/TLJ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Jul-10-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vincent Ian Parrett of BERGESON LLP (408-291-6200 / 408-291-2756), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Willard E. Bartel and David Peebles, Administrators of the Estate of Donna Hamilton, Deceased
John Herrick of MOTLEY RICE LLC (843-216-9000), also present
Andrew I. Port and Cheryl A. Morris of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & WALOVICH LLP (415-227-9455), appearing for defendant / responding party Matson Navigation Company, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS WILLARD BARTEL, ET AL.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE OF JOHN HERRICK

No objection made. The Court ordered the following: Plaintiffs' motion for admission pro hac vice of John Herrick is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kyle McLean of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13787 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Preclude Use Of Materials Subject To Attorney Client Privilege And To Require Return Of Said Documents And To Disqualify Plaintiffs Counsel
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Andrew I. Port and Cheryl A. Morris of EMARD DANOFF PORT TAMULSKI & WALOVICH LLP (415-227-9455), appearing for defendant / moving party Matson Navigation Company, Inc.
Vincent Ian Parrett of BERGESON LLP (408-291-6200 / 408-291-2756), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Willard E. Bartel and David Peebles, Administrators of the Estate of Donna Hamilton, Deceased
John Herrick of MOTLEY RICE LLC (843-216-9000), appearing for plaintiffs /opposing parties Willard E. Bartel and David Peebles, Administrators of the Estate of Donna Hamilton, Deceased
Alex F. Pevzner of WFBM, LLP (415-781-7072), appearing for specially appearing defendants Olympic Steamship Company, Inc. and Alaska Steamship Co.

RULING:
DEFENDANT MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER TO PRECLUDE USE OF MATERIALS SUBJECT TO ATTORNEY CLIENT PRIVILEGE AND TO REQUIRE RETURN OF SAID DOCUMENTS AND TO DISQUALIFY PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL

Hearing held. The Court took Defendant Matson Navigation Company, Inc.'s motion for protective order to preclude use of materials subject to attorney client privilege and to require return of said documents and to disqualify plaintiffs' counsel under submission. Defendant submitted its proposed order for the Court's consideration. Plaintiffs will submit their own version by May 11, 2015. A stipulation and order (re: briefing schedules of Matson's demurrer and setting page limits on briefs) signed in open court. This order is also applicable to #CGC-14-276305, Bartel, et al. (Administrators of the Estate of Williamson) v. Alaska Steamship case. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Kyle McLean of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13787 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
